metadata.title: Biscuit Is Gone!
metadata.one_liner: The classroom hamster has escaped, and someone let him out on purpose!

visual.palette: chalkboard green, sunflower yellow, and bright classroom colors

cover.summary: A school mystery with an open hamster cage and muddy paw prints.

narrative.premise: Biscuit the hamster escaped from Room 4 during lunch. Someone opened the cage on purpose. Can you find out who?
starting_knowledge: Biscuit is missing from his cage.
The latch was opened by someone.

locations.name: Classroom
locations.description: A bright classroom with posters, desks, and Biscuit's cage by the window.
search_context: The tricky sideways latch is open.
A hamster food pellet sits beside the cage.

visual.summary: A colorful classroom with a hamster cage, desks, and paper stars.

locations.name: Hallway
locations.description: A long corridor lined with coat pegs and lunch boxes.
search_context: Most of the class stayed here with Miss Lee.
The coat pegs rattle when children rush by.

visual.summary: A school corridor with coat pegs, lunch boxes, and shiny floor tiles.

locations.name: Garden
locations.description: A small school garden with raised flower beds and soft muddy soil.
search_context: Tiny paw prints lead to the sunflowers.
Biscuit is sniffing happily near the plants.

visual.summary: A small school garden with sunflowers, muddy paths, and a happy hamster.

locations.name: Art Room
locations.description: A cheerful room full of paint pots and drying paper.
search_context: Lucas's painting is still wet on the stand.
There is no sign that Ruby worked here at lunch.

visual.summary: An art room with easels, paint pots, and wet paper paintings.

roleplay.persona: A caring pet helper who gets flustered when blamed.
roleplay.background: She adores Biscuit and knows how the latch works.

characters.private_alibi: I was painting in the Art Room.
characters.private_motive: She wanted to cuddle Biscuit during lunch.

visual.summary: A schoolgirl in a green cardigan with bright worried eyes.

roleplay.persona: A grumpy student who hates unfair blame.
roleplay.background: He complained that Biscuit was noisy once.

characters.private_alibi: I was in the hallway with Miss Lee.
characters.private_motive: Other children think he disliked Biscuit.

visual.summary: A freckled boy with messy hair and a crossed-arm stance.

roleplay.persona: An easy-going painter who happily explains what he saw.
roleplay.background: He spends lunch in the Art Room with permission.

characters.private_alibi: I was in the Art Room painting all lunch.

visual.summary: A cheerful boy with paint-stained hands and a brush behind one ear.

evidence.player_text: The cage latch is open the special sideways way.
evidence.fact_summary: Only someone who knew the latch could open it quickly.

evidence.player_text: Tiny paw prints lead through the garden to Biscuit.
evidence.fact_summary: Biscuit escaped from the classroom into the garden.

evidence.player_text: Lucas's painting is still wet, proving he stayed in the Art Room.
evidence.fact_summary: Lucas has a strong innocent alibi.

evidence.player_text: Ruby admits she opened the cage because she wanted to cuddle Biscuit.
evidence.fact_summary: Ruby opened the cage and caused the escape.

ground_truth.what_happened: Ruby opened Biscuit's cage during lunch and he escaped into the garden.
ground_truth.why_it_happened: She loved Biscuit and wanted to cuddle him.
ground_truth.explanation: Ruby knew the latch, let Biscuit out, and lost control of him before lunch ended, while Oscar stayed in the hallway and Lucas stayed painting.

suspect_truths.actual_activity: She slipped back to the classroom and opened Biscuit's cage.
suspect_truths.stated_alibi: I was painting in the Art Room.

suspect_truths.actual_activity: He stayed in the hallway with Miss Lee.
suspect_truths.stated_alibi: I was in the hallway with Miss Lee.
suspect_truths.motive: He once complained about the hamster.

suspect_truths.actual_activity: He painted in the Art Room.
suspect_truths.stated_alibi: I was in the Art Room painting all lunch.

timeline.summary: Most of the class heads into the hallway with Miss Lee.
Ruby returns to the classroom and opens the cage.
Biscuit runs from the classroom into the garden.
